title: ConceptSeed
description: Output of concept-identification when a candidate is user-facing and has its own purpose, actions, and stateful behavior. One seed per identified concept.

kind.description: Discriminator: distinguishes a ConceptSeed from a SpecSeed.

name.description: Concept name, recognizable to users, not implementation jargon.

description.description: Brief description of what the concept is about.

source.description: 'new' for greenfield concepts, 'existing' for decomposed from existing system.
